channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: EU co-finances Rwanda’s deployment in Mozambique
item.description: MAPUTO,- Mozambique’s Daniel Chapo, announced that the European Union will contribute to the financing of Rwanda’s mission to combat terrorism in Cabo Delgado. The Head of State explained that “the operations of the Rwandan forces will be funded by public funds and those coming from the European Union itself, as has always been done, both [...] The post EU co-finances Rwanda’s deployment in Mozambique appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Reimagining Cold Storage Commission: A New Blueprint for Zimbabwe’s Agricultural Value Chain
item.description: BULAWAYO – Although the government’s previous blueprint for the Cold Storage Commission (CSC) ultimately failed to achieve its intended objectives, the institution’s original strategic rationale remains highly relevant to Zimbabwe’s contemporary agricultural economy. By Our Insights Team Rather than viewing the CSC solely through the lens of its unsuccessful partnership with Boustead Beef, policymakers should [...] The post Reimagining Cold Storage Commission: A New Blueprint for Zimbabwe’s Agricultural Value Chain appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Armed robbers rape 2 Harare sisters without protection, force 14-year-old boy to also have lula lula with his sister
item.description: Armed Robbers Rape Two Harare Sisters, Force Teenager to Abuse Cousin in Harrowing Home Invasion HARARE — A quiet Monday morning in the western outskirts of Harare was shattered by a brutal home invasion in Whitecliff, where two armed robbers subjected a family to unspeakable violence. In a disturbing display of depravity, the intruders not [...] The post Armed robbers rape 2 Harare sisters without protection, force 14-year-old boy to also have lula lula with his sister first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Conspiracy Claims Emerge After Death of Air Force Officer as Questions Swirl Around Military Losses
item.description: By A Correspondent| The Air Force of Zimbabwe is mourning the death of Wing Commander John Katandika, whose passing was... Continue reading "Conspiracy Claims Emerge After Death of Air Force Officer as Questions Swirl Around Military Losses" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa
item.description: Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa The Government has approved a flexible customs administration mechanism designed to make it easier for Zimbabweans returning from South Africa to bring their personal belongings and selected assets back home. The Ministry of Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion said the temporary [...] The post Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Chamuka urges national unity, says Zimbabwe must choose economy over politics
item.description: By A Correspondent| People’s Unity Party (PUP) leader Herbert Chamuka has called for a new era of political cooperation in... Continue reading "Chamuka urges national unity, says Zimbabwe must choose economy over politics" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: George Charamba Tells Returning Zimbabweans: ‘South Africa Is No Longer an Option’
item.description: George Charamba Says SA Door Is Closed, Calls on Returnees to Build Zimbabwe Presidential spokesperson George Charamba has urged Zimbabweans returning from South Africa to view their homecoming as permanent, arguing that the time has come for them to rebuild their lives and contribute to the country’s development instead of seeking opportunities across the border. [...] The post George Charamba Tells Returning Zimbabweans: ‘South Africa Is No Longer an Option’ appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: War veteran asks High Court to halt CAB3 over alleged MP bribery claims @nehandaradio
item.description: A war veteran has launched an urgent High Court bid to stop the final processing of CAB3, alleging the parliamentary vote was tainted by cash payments and luxury vehicle gifts to MPs. The post War veteran asks High Court to halt CAB3 over alleged MP bribery claims appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Mukuru Cashier Steals US$34K, Uses Loot to Open Shop
item.description: Mukuru Cashier Steals US$34K, Uses Loot to Open Shop A 27-year-old cashier employed by Mukuru Money Transfers has been sentenced to nine years in prison after she misappropriated more than US$34,000 in company funds and used part of the money to establish a retail business in Gokwe. Masciline Chihambakwe, who worked for Send Money Home [...] The post Mukuru Cashier Steals US$34K, Uses Loot to Open Shop appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: People should have been involved in CAB 3: General Chiwenga Fires Another Explosive Cryptic Message (VIDEO) @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Harare – Vice President Constantino Chiwenga has once again captured national attention with a series of veiled pronouncements, sparking intense speculation about the intricate power dynamics within Zimbabwe’s ruling ZANU-PF party. His latest message, delivered through a biblical allegory, has been widely interpreted as a direct challenge to the controversial Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 [...] The post People should have been involved in CAB 3: General Chiwenga Fires Another Explosive Cryptic Message (VIDEO) first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bindura Man Jailed After Cutting Off Part Of Wife’s Private Parts With Razor Blade
item.description: Bindura Man Uses Razor Blade To Cut Wife’s Private Parts During Intimate Moment A 32-year-old Bindura man has been jailed after cutting off part of his wife’s private parts with a razor blade during a domestic dispute. The Bindura Magistrates’ Court sentenced the man to an effective 12 months in prison after he pleaded guilty [...] The post Bindura Man Jailed After Cutting Off Part Of Wife’s Private Parts With Razor Blade appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Mnangagwa Makes Big Military Appointment
item.description: By A Correspondent | President Emmerson Mnangagwa has made another strategic security move by promoting Brigadier General Fidelis Mhonda to the... Continue reading "Mnangagwa Makes Big Military Appointment" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe Eyes Sex Offenders Register But Government Flags Tough Questions
item.description: Zimbabwe Moves To Establish Sex Offenders Register As Government Weighs Privacy Concerns Zimbabwe is moving to establish a sex offenders register as the Government steps up efforts to curb sexual offences. However, officials say privacy, human dignity and constitutional rights are among the major issues that must be carefully considered before the proposed system takes [...] The post Zimbabwe Eyes Sex Offenders Register But Government Flags Tough Questions appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Dramatic Courtroom Twist: SDA Evangelist Sam Marufu Walks Free Leaving Three Humiliated Pastors Wives Devastated
item.description: The Digital Pulpit: Cyberbullying Allegations Expose Deep Rifts Within Zimbabwe’s SDA Church In a case that has gripped the nation and exposed the darker side of social media within religious circles, prominent Seventh-Day Adventist (SDA) Evangelist Sam Marufu walked out of the Harare Magistrates Court a free man yesterday. The dramatic turn of events came [...] The post Dramatic Courtroom Twist: SDA Evangelist Sam Marufu Walks Free Leaving Three Humiliated Pastors Wives Devastated first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: TJ Maguranyanga discovering NFL talent in Zimbabwe
item.description: IN a bid to unearth talent, NFL player Thabani ‘T.J’ Maguranyanga hosted a player-led clinic at Harare Sports Club on Thursday. Maguranyanga, who is one of the few Zimbabwean players to have featured in the NFL, is on a drive to discover talent for a sport that is rarely played in the country. The lanky [...] The post TJ Maguranyanga discovering NFL talent in Zimbabwe appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
